productDisplayName: Puma Men Faas 500 NM Fade Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: The Faas 500 shoes from puma is a lightweight everyday trainer. Inspired by old school running trainers, these shoes are not only perfectly designed for sport, but also look great when teamed with casual wear. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic suede overlays for structure and breathability Formstripe on both sides Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Midsole Full-length lateral groove in the midsole to reinforce stability throughout the gait cycle OrthoLite sockliner for superior comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole BioRide technology for a more natural and responsive ride EverRide technology to reduce weight and improve forefoot cushioning EverTrack used in the outsole for greater durability in high-wear areas Rocker shape of outsole allows for natural stride with an effortless toe-off Flex grooves built across the waffle patterned outsole to enhance flexibility shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
